name: MGT CAPITAL INVESTMENTS, INC.
business: The Company historically operated in the cryptocurrency mining and hosting industry, with a primary focus on Bitcoin. As of December 31, 2025, it has no active revenue-generating operations following the sale of its primary facility and cessation of mining. The Company is engaged in a strategic review to identify new business opportunities.

exposures.sentence: Bitcoin mining entails solving complex mathematical problems using ASIC computers to perform calculations and add transaction blocks to the Blockchain ledger.
The Bitcoin we may mine may be subject to loss, damage, theft or restriction on access.
